hypothesis: Extending the closed-loop Bayesian optimization framework to simultaneously optimize catalyst composition (e.g., silver nanoparticle size, loading density, and bimetallic dopant fraction) alongside the six electrolyzer operating parameters identified in this work will reveal synergistic catalyst-electrolyte interactions that shift the reactor yield optimum to values exceeding 100 mA cm⁻² by enabling higher CO₂ utilization at elevated partial current densities, a regime inaccessible through operating parameter optimization alone.
